## Source: amazon-inspector (454ed598382f4741fd508b6e967cfbf60629e200716dd52a83502bc7d9bdd487)
The package bytefrontier-api was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (8bf960fbb88b4185eadb13ee196547f10f878ca14c2e8a9d2384f2f6c36e57a5)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'bytefrontier-api' @ 99.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
